title: viburnum formosanum subsp. formosanum
intro: Viburnum formosanum subsp. formosanum, also known as Taiwan sweet viburnum, is a species of flowering plant in the family Adoxaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, making it effective in treating various health issues. The plant is rich in vitamins and minerals, and its extracts have been found to have antioxidant and anti-cancer properties, offering several health benefits such as reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and boosting the immune system. Viburnum formosanum subsp. formosanum can be prepared into various herbal remedies, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to treat digestive issues, fever, and skin conditions.
